nasb.text: Let your heart therefore be wholly devoted to the Lord our God, to walk in His statutes and to keep His commandments, as at this day.”

esv.text: Let your heart therefore be wholly true to the Lord our God, walking in his statutes and keeping his commandments, as at this day.”

cnv.text: 所以你們的心要完全歸給耶和華我們的　神，遵行他的律例，謹守他的誡命，像今天一樣。”

ccb.text: 愿你们像今天一样专心事奉我们的上帝耶和华，遵行祂的律法，谨守祂的诫命。”
